name: @pryzm/family-instance
description: PRYZM 2 — pure-Node family-instance bake pipeline (S56 D2/D3).  bakeFamilyInstance({ family, typeId, instanceOverrides }) resolves the family's parameters via @pryzm/family-runtime, evaluates each profile to a closed polygon, and dispatches @pryzm/geometry-kernel producers (extrude/sweep/loft/revolve).  Returns one BufferGeometryDescriptor per solid.  No THREE — the editor's THREE-side wrapper (FamilyInstanceCommitter) lives in apps/component-editor and consumes these descriptors.
